CustomObject.description: Per-donor, per-fiscal-year (July 1–June 30) accumulator of giving. Keeps a running hard-credit total, soft-credit total, combined total, the earned/effective/override level, and the date each level was achieved. Links to the prior year's summary to carry a level forward one year (inheritance). Populated by Gift Allocation rollups + level automation. JSI-90 Moves Management. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomObject.label: Annual Giving Summary
